title.zh: 03 GitHub Pages 部署失败诊断

observation.zh: 双语、链接、验收、禁用词通过
observation.en: Bilingual, links, acceptance, and blocked words passed

observation.zh: 第一个失败点在 Pages 配置或 artifact 步骤
observation.en: First failure located in Pages configuration or artifact step

observation.zh: 新 run build/deploy 成功，线上返回 200
observation.en: New run build/deploy passed and live URL returned 200

zh: npm run build && npm run check && git diff --check
en: npm run build && npm run check && git diff --check

zh: 只把新 run 作为成功依据，不回头修改旧失败 run 的判断。
发布修复和内容改动尽量分开，便于回滚。
宣布完成前必须同时确认 Actions 与线上地址。
en: Use only the new run as success evidence; do not reinterpret the old failed run.
Keep publish fixes and content edits separate where possible for rollback.
Before declaring completion, confirm both Actions and the live URL.

trigger.zh: 收到部署失败通知，build 红色、deploy 跳过，需要判断是内容、workflow 还是发布配置问题。
trigger.en: A deploy failure notification showed build red and deploy skipped, requiring separation of content, workflow, and publish configuration issues.

firstSignal.zh: 邮件只说明失败，无法证明第一个红色步骤在哪里。
firstSignal.en: The email only said the run failed and did not prove the first red step.

doneSignal.zh: 新提交触发的 build 与 deploy 均成功，线上案例总览返回 200。
doneSignal.en: The new commit produced successful build and deploy jobs, and the live recipe index returned 200.
